plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-603 RP19.P07.M06.S05-RP19.P08.M03.S21 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-603 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP19 p07 closeout p08 foundation: the P07 Synthetic Fixture Set tail (the eighteen remaining rows), the full P07 Test And Golden Case Set, Hermes Evidence Packet, Claude Review Packet, and Closeout And Next Handoff cycles, the full P08 Scope Inventory, Contract Draft, and Type And Shape Definition cycles, and the P08 Primary Implementation Slice head (the first twenty-one rows) as nine descriptor-only sections over 150 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H19), Claude review packet (C19), and CP00-604 handoff, without opening client portal, secure link, client review, or watermark runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-603 (Risk C, 150 units, RP19.P07.M06.S05-RP19.P08.M03.S21) is a descriptor-only client-portal-core P07-closeout/P08-foundation pack whose claims are conservative and fully supported. Verified via Read/Grep/Glob: manifest.json and command-evidence.json both assert production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false (no overclaim). Source (registry.js, service.js, validators.js, validator script) is descriptor-only: all imports internal, no fetch/http/child_process/fs-write/process.env/db/eval/dynamic-import sinks; every result frozen with exhaustive no-write/no-runtime/no-leak flags; validators enforce per-row descriptor_only=true / runtime_execution=false / customer_safe_errors_only=true / raw_payload_included=false. Coverage is exact and internally consistent across baseline, registry requirements, contract projection, and README: 150 units; deliverable 54/9/24/44/4/10/5; phase P07=93/P08=57; micro-phase 18/22/22/20/11/8/8/20/21. Authority boundary correct - Claude read-only and not final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true), hard-asserted by tests (model.test.js) and the contract validator (cp603Coverage.valid/cp603Slice.valid asserted true). Hermes patterns used only as deterministic evidence/review packet descriptors (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime. CP178+ review-evidence chain is well-formed: readiness-report auth preflight passed (exit 0, stdout 1432 bytes non-empty valid JSON), validation-report shows prompt 2429B under 25600 limit, no full diff/source in prompt, source_inspection_mode=read_tools_used, summary_only correctly prohibited, schema present, no forbidden tools, nothing omitted. All listed validation commands recorded exit_code 0. No P0/P1/P2 issues. Two non-blocking P3 advisory notes only; pack and goal closeout not blocked.

findings.title: Post-review required artifacts not yet present (by-design gating; must exist before closeout)
findings.details: manifest.evidence_refs (line 5969) and required_pack_artifacts (line 5976) list claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but only manifest.json and command-evidence.json currently exist in docs/closeout-packs/cp00-603/. This is expected at the current read_only_claude_run_raw_capture stage: command-evidence.json (notes, line 127) explicitly documents these as post-review gated commands/artifacts produced from the accepted review before commit, and pack_level_claude_review.status is 'pending' with valid_review_receipts empty. The pack-level production_ready claim is false and does not assert it has passed adjudication/inspection, so this is consistent rather than an overclaim. Flagged only to confirm closeout must not proceed until these three artifacts exist and reflect exactly one accepted valid review.
findings.recommendation: Before running closeout-pack:validate and committing, produce claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json from this accepted review; ensure the receipt/normalize steps reject any auth failure, 0-byte stdout, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, or missing required fields as invalid review evidence.
findings.post_review_disposition: Non-blocking; by-design post-review gating confirmed. Does not affect the descriptor-only production_ready=false claim.

findings.title: changed-file-scope.json dual-categorizes two paths as both implementation and unrelated (metadata-only)
findings.details: docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md and docs/closeout-packs/cp00-603/ appear in both untracked_implementation_files (lines 159-160) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (lines 165-166), which are semantically opposed categories. Neither path is included in active_pack_implementation_refs (lines 5-14), so the pack's authoritative implementation surface (8 client-portal files + contract + validator script) is unaffected, and active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty. Pure reviewer-scope metadata inconsistency with no effect on the pack deliverables, boundaries, or production_ready claim.
findings.recommendation: Adjust the scope-generation harness so a path is classified into exactly one bucket (e.g., the pack's own evidence directory docs/closeout-packs/cp00-603/ should not be labeled 'unrelated_dirty_files_preserved').
findings.post_review_disposition: Non-blocking; metadata categorization only, does not change the active pack scope or any claim.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-603 client portal core p07 closeout p08 foundation descriptor pack
